title: Battle of Mandalore (disambiguation)
content:
'''Battle of Mandalore''' might refer to:

==Canon==
*The '''[[Battle of Mandalore]]''', a battle that took place in [[Sundari]] during the [[Clone Wars]] in [[19 BBY]]
*The '''[[Siege of Mandalore]]''', another battle that took place during the Clone Wars in 19 BBY
*The '''[[Mission to Mandalore]]''', a mission during the [[Occupation of Mandalore]] undertaken by [[Sabine Wren]]
*The '''[[Great Purge of Mandalore]]''', a [[Night of a Thousand Tears|conflict]] between the [[Galactic Empire]] and the [[Mandalorian|people]] of [[Mandalore]]
*The '''[[Liberation of Mandalore]]'''

==Legends==
===Pre-[[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]===
*The '''[[Battle of Mandalore (pre-Naboo)|Battle of Mandalore]]'''

===[[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]===
*The '''[[Battle of Mandalore/Legends|Battle of Mandalore]]'''

===[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]===
*The '''[[Mission to Mandalore (Zann Consortium)|Mission to Mandalore]]'''
*The '''[[Skirmish over Mandalore]]'''
*'''[[Skirmish in the Mandalorian forest]]'''
*The '''[[Battle of the City of Bone]]'''

===[[Nagai/Legends|Nagai]]/[[Tof/Legends|Tof invasion]]===
*The '''[[Battle of Mandalore (Nagai invasion)|Battle of Mandalore]]'''

===[[Yuuzhan Vong War]]===
*The '''[[Battle of Mandalore (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Mandalore]]'''

===[[Second Galactic Civil War]]===
*The '''[[Battle of Mandalore (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Mandalore]]'''

==Real world==
*"'''[[Battle for Mandalore]]'''", a article published in [[Challenge 58|''Challenge'' 58]]

}}
